intro: I'm always glad to connect with researchers and groups working on AI for chemistry, machine learning potentials, or quantum chemistry methods. If you're interested in collaborating, please reach out below.

collaborators.name: Prof. Ireneusz Grabowski & Dr. Szymon Śmiga
collaborators.institution: Faculty of Physics, Astronomy and Informatics, Nicolaus Copernicus University in Toruń, Poland
collaborators.description: Developing machine learning potentials capable of exceeding standard density functional theory accuracy.
